name: Stephen Magare Ogaro
about: Stephen is a Full-Stack Developer and Technical Lead at NK-Organics Medical Missionaries, blending software development with content strategy, digital marketing, and natural health education. He serves as Departmental Head for Revival & Reformation at Zimmerman SDA Church, where he coordinates prayer cells, leads weekly intercessory prayer sessions, and facilitates morning devotions. A passionate servant leader, Stephen believes in using every gift—technical, spiritual, and creative—to bring health and hope through God's natural remedies. He is currently pursuing the Master Guide certification to deepen his leadership skills and better serve the youth and children in his community.
mission: “I believe in servant leadership that empowers others through mentorship, strategic vision that transforms communities, and faithful stewardship that leverages both spiritual gifts and professional skills.”
dedication: To the Lord Jesus Christ, who called me by name; to my family who supports me; and to the youth of Zimmerman SDA Church—you are why I serve.

items.title: Academic & Professional Journey
items.description: Bachelor in Information Technology (Technical University of Kenya, 2018–2024) with honors. Software developer and prompt engineer specializing in Next.js, React, and Java. Continuous certifications and self‑directed learning in modern web technologies. Full details, including secondary and primary education, certifications, and projects, are available on my main portfolio.

items.title: Serepta Children's Home Visit – GYD 2026
items.description: On 21st March 2026, as part of Global Youth Day, I joined fellow Master Guides and youth at Serepta Children's Home. I had the joy of teaching the children, drawing with them, serving meals, and dancing together. It was a beautiful day of giving and receiving love.
